name: Impossible Hamburg Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine baking mix and water until soft dough forms. Beat vigorously.
2. Smooth dough into a ball on floured board. Knead 5 times.
3. Roll dough 2 inches larger than 9 inches pie plate. Place into plate, flute edges.
4. Brown ground beef and drain.
5. Stir in salt, oregano, pepper, onion, bread crumbs, tomato sauce and spread in pie crust.
6. Beat egg and milk, stir in remaining ingredients.
7. Spread over beef mixture.
8. Bake until crust is golden, about 30 minutes at 375°F.
